text:
ascendant be in the 7th house along with
a benefic—-wife belongs to a good family.
(v) The Moon occupying the 1st or 7th house in her own
or exaltation Sign and aspected by a benefic—she is virtuous.
(vi) The 7th house falling in a benefic Sign or Amsa, (still
better if aspected by benefics)—wife is virtuous.
(vii) The 7th house, its lord and Venus be all in even signs
and be bright, and strong—the wife will be very good.
(viii) The lords of II, Vll and XII houses occupying Kendras
or Konas and being aspected by Jupiter, or benefics occupying
the 2nd, 7th and lith houses counted from the lord of the 7th
house—the subject will give all happiness to the wife.
The number of wives one is likely to have can be ascertained
from the number of planets occupying the 7th house as well as
from that of the planets conjoined with Venus and the lord of
the 7th house. According to some it is given by the number
of planets conjoined with Venus when the 7th house is occupied.
